hooks.command: sh -lc 'pnpm test --silent 1>&2; code=$?; if [ $code -eq 0 ]; then printf "{}"; else printf "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"pnpm test --silent failed. Review the failing test output and fix the issue before finishing.\"}"; fi'
hooks.commandWindows: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "pnpm test --silent 1>&2; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { '{}' } else { '{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"pnpm test --silent failed. Review the failing test output and fix the issue before finishing.\"}' }"
